TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Fiet-nam, title = Fiet-nam, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fiet-nam} }

S.FORM: Vietnam YI-NAN-SE-HOY-CO-I-KONG-HE-KWO, YI-NAN sa to a mapangangan, I kakaay to no 9,600 a ca'or ko ka'aloman no polong a tamdaw, i saka15 ko sa'alomanay a tamdaw itini i hekal. O HE-NEY-SE ko syoto, HO-CE-MIN-SE ko sata'angayay a maci. O edengan i rikecay a Seyci-Tantay no seyfo ko Yi-Nan-Kong-Can-Tang. I 'ayaway to, aniniay to i, o no Holam a tilid ato pongka ko tapinangan no YI-NAN, o no Tong-Nan-Ya a kitakit a cefang, Se-Ciy-Maw-I a cefang, Ya-Co-Tay-Ping-Yang-Cin-Ci-He-Cow a cefang, O mamalasaka11 a Forans a sowal a kitakit a cefang. Itini i 16 10 N, 107 50 E, noAsiya ko Vietnam. Polong no sekalay i 331,210 sq km "saka 66 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 310,070 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 21,140 sq km " Polong i 95,261,021 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 34.80%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 45%, malo no roma to a sera 20.20%. siyoto O Hanoi ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakasiwa 2 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci TrŠļßn ńźŠļ°i Quang, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 2 a romi'ad. Finacadan/Tamdaw Adihayay ko finawlan no YI-NAN, makomod i 54 ko finawlan, Cin-Co(Yey-Co) ko masakakaay a finawlan, 86.2% ko ka'aloman i komod no finawlan, maedeng 1% ko teloc no Holam a tamdaw. Kei-Cay I 1986 a miheca mipalasawad to to adihayay a pipatokas a misatapang a misafeloh mifalic to ko YI-NAN, 2001 a miheca mapatiteng to ko mikeriday a SE-HOY-CO-I to Maci- Kei-Cay i, sanarikay sato a mapalowad ko Kei-Cay no polong no finawlan, malasanarikayay a lomahad a malalad ko Kei-Cay i Asia, i hekal to, nai sapakoyocay a kitakit a matongal to ko lifon no kitakit, i kafiyor no Covid-19 a lifong ko kalokitakit i, lomahad matongal haca ko Kei-Cay no YI-NAN O kanga'ayan a pala no liomahan i YI-NAN, makadofahay ko panay, makadofahay ko kafaedetan a pinaloma ato i 'aloay i riyaray a pina'orip, o sata'angayay a mipa'acaay to liomahan a kitakit, o sata'angayay a pa'acaay to kaso i hekal, maedeng 80% ko ka'adihay no kaso i hekal, o saka2ay a pa'acaay to panay i hekal, o saka2ay a pa'acaay to kohi, o sa'adihayay a Ropasta kohi no pa'acaan a kitakit. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: b~vi…ôtnam ji-nan-s…ô-ńßo~uj- ¶o~u-i-ko~un*-ńß…ô-kwo~u, ji-nan sa to~u a mapaŇčaŇčan, i kakaaj to~u no~u *,*** a ¶a °o~ur ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u po~u…ĺo~uŇč a tam…¨~…ģaw, i saka** ko~u sa °a…ĺo~umanaj a tam…¨~…ģaw itini i ńß…ôka…ĺ. o~u ńß…ô-n…ôj-s…ô ko~u sjo~uto~u, ńßo~u- ¶…ô-min-s…ô ko~u sata °aŇčajaj a ma ¶i. o~u …ô…¨~…ģ…ôŇčan i rik…ô ¶aj a s…ôj ¶i-tantaj no~u s…ôjfo~u ko~u ji-nan-ko~uŇč- ¶an-taŇč. i °ajawaj to~u, aniniaj to~u i, o~u no~u ńßo~u…ĺam a ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ ato~u po~uŇčka ko~u tapinaŇčan no~u ji-nan, o~u no~u to~uŇč-nan-ja a kitakit a ¶…ôfaŇč, s…ô- ¶ij-maw-i a ¶…ôfaŇč, ja- ¶o~u-taj-piŇč-jaŇč- ¶in- ¶i-ńß…ô- ¶o~uw a ¶…ôfaŇč, o~u mama…ĺasaka** a fo~urans a so~uwa…ĺ a kitakit a ¶…ôfaŇč. itini i ** ** n, *** ** …ô, no~uasija ko~u b~vi…ôtnam. po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u s…ôka…ĺaj i ***,*** s* km "saka ** ko~u rajraj no~u ŇčaŇčan. " "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, ***,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, **,*** s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i **,***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra **%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra **.**%. sijo~uto~u o~u ńßano~ui ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umir…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pińßirat…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i sakasiwa * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i tr*n **i *o~u~uaŇč, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. fina ¶a…¨~…ģan/tam…¨~…ģaw a…¨~…ģińßajaj ko~u finaw…ĺan no~u ji-nan, mako~umo~u…¨~…ģ i ** ko~u finaw…ĺan, ¶in- ¶o~u(j…ôj- ¶o~u) ko~u masakakaaj a finaw…ĺan, **.*% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman i ko~umo~u…¨~…ģ no~u finaw…ĺan, ma…ô…¨~…ģ…ôŇč *% ko~u t…ô…ĺo~u ¶ no~u ńßo~u…ĺam a tam…¨~…ģaw. k…ôi- ¶aj i **** a mińß…ô ¶a mipa…ĺasawa…¨~…ģ to~u to~u a…¨~…ģińßajaj a pipato~ukas a misatapaŇč a misaf…ô…ĺo~uńß mifa…ĺi ¶ to~u ko~u ji-nan, **** a mińß…ô ¶a mapatit…ôŇč to~u ko~u mik…ôri…¨~…ģaj a s…ô-ńßo~uj- ¶o~u-i to~u ma ¶i- k…ôi- ¶aj i, sanarikaj sato~u a mapa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ ko~u k…ôi- ¶aj no~u po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u finaw…ĺan, ma…ĺasanarikajaj a …ĺo~umańßa…¨~…ģ a ma…ĺa…ĺa…¨~…ģ ko~u k…ôi- ¶aj i asia, i ńß…ôka…ĺ to~u, nai sapako~ujo~u ¶aj a kitakit a mato~uŇča…ĺ to~u ko~u …ĺifo~un no~u kitakit, i kafijo~ur no~u ¶o~ub~vi…¨~…ģ-** a …ĺifo~uŇč ko~u ka…ĺo~ukitakit i, …ĺo~umańßa…¨~…ģ mato~uŇča…ĺ ńßa ¶a ko~u k…ôi- ¶aj no~u ji-nan o~u kaŇča °ajan a pa…ĺa no~u …ĺio~umańßan i ji-nan, maka…¨~…ģo~ufańßaj ko~u panaj, maka…¨~…ģo~ufańßaj ko~u kafa…ô…¨~…ģ…ôtan a pina…ĺo~uma ato~u i °a…ĺo~uaj i rijaraj a pina °o~urip, o~u sata °aŇčajaj a mipa °a ¶aaj to~u …ĺio~umańßan a kitakit, o~u sata °aŇčajaj a pa °a ¶aaj to~u kaso~u i ńß…ôka…ĺ, ma…ô…¨~…ģ…ôŇč **% ko~u ka °a…¨~…ģińßaj no~u kaso~u i ńß…ôka…ĺ, o~u saka*aj a pa °a ¶aaj to~u panaj i ńß…ôka…ĺ, o~u saka*aj a pa °a ¶aaj to~u ko~uńßi, o~u sa °a…¨~…ģińßajaj a ro~upasta ko~uńßi no~u pa °a ¶aan a kitakit. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
S.FORM: Vietnam YI-NAN-SE-HOY-CO-I-KONG-HE-KWO, YI-NAN sa to a mapangangan, I kakaay to no 9,600 a ca'or ko ka'aloman no polong a tamdaw, i saka15 ko sa'alomanay a tamdaw itini i hekal. O HE-NEY-SE ko syoto, HO-CE-MIN-SE ko sata'angayay a maci. O edengan i rikecay a Seyci-Tantay no seyfo ko Yi-Nan-Kong-Can-Tang. I 'ayaway to, aniniay to i, o no Holam a tilid ato pongka ko tapinangan no YI-NAN, o no Tong-Nan-Ya a kitakit a cefang, Se-Ciy-Maw-I a cefang, Ya-Co-Tay-Ping-Yang-Cin-Ci-He-Cow a cefang, O mamalasaka11 a Forans a sowal a kitakit a cefang. Itini i 16 10 N, 107 50 E, noAsiya ko Vietnam. Polong no sekalay i 331,210 sq km "saka 66 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 310,070 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 21,140 sq km " Polong i 95,261,021 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 34.80%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 45%, malo no roma to a sera 20.20%. siyoto O Hanoi ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakasiwa 2 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci TrŠļßn ńźŠļ°i Quang, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 2 a romi'ad. Finacadan/Tamdaw Adihayay ko finawlan no YI-NAN, makomod i 54 ko finawlan, Cin-Co(Yey-Co) ko masakakaay a finawlan, 86.2% ko ka'aloman i komod no finawlan, maedeng 1% ko teloc no Holam a tamdaw. Kei-Cay I 1986 a miheca mipalasawad to to adihayay a pipatokas a misatapang a misafeloh mifalic to ko YI-NAN, 2001 a miheca mapatiteng to ko mikeriday a SE-HOY-CO-I to Maci- Kei-Cay i, sanarikay sato a mapalowad ko Kei-Cay no polong no finawlan, malasanarikayay a lomahad a malalad ko Kei-Cay i Asia, i hekal to, nai sapakoyocay a kitakit a matongal to ko lifon no kitakit, i kafiyor no Covid-19 a lifong ko kalokitakit i, lomahad matongal haca ko Kei-Cay no YI-NAN O kanga'ayan a pala no liomahan i YI-NAN, makadofahay ko panay, makadofahay ko kafaedetan a pinaloma ato i 'aloay i riyaray a pina'orip, o sata'angayay a mipa'acaay to liomahan a kitakit, o sata'angayay a pa'acaay to kaso i hekal, maedeng 80% ko ka'adihay no kaso i hekal, o saka2ay a pa'acaay to panay i hekal, o saka2ay a pa'acaay to kohi, o sa'adihayay a Ropasta kohi no pa'acaan a kitakit. ko~umo~u…¨~…ģ no~u finaw…ĺan, ma…ô…¨~…ģ…ôŇč *% ko~u t…ô…ĺo~u ¶ no~u ńßo~u…ĺam a tam…¨~…ģaw. k…ôi- ¶aj i **** a mińß…ô ¶a mipa…ĺasawa…¨~…ģ to~u to~u a…¨~…ģińßajaj a pipato~ukas a misatapaŇč a misaf…ô…ĺo~uńß mifa…ĺi ¶ to~u ko~u ji-nan, **** a mińß…ô ¶a mapatit…ôŇč to~u ko~u mik…ôri…¨~…ģaj a s…ô-ńßo~uj- ¶o~u-i to~u ma ¶i- k…ôi- ¶aj i, sanarikaj sato~u a mapa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ ko~u k…ôi- ¶aj no~u po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u finaw…ĺan, ma…ĺasanarikajaj a …ĺo~umańßa…¨~…ģ a ma…ĺa…ĺa…¨~…ģ ko~u k…ôi- ¶aj i asia, i ńß…ôka…ĺ to~u, nai sapako~ujo~u ¶aj a kitakit a mato~uŇča…ĺ to~u ko~u …ĺifo~un no~u kitakit, i kafijo~ur no~u ¶o~ub~vi…¨~…ģ-** a …ĺifo~uŇč ko~u ka…ĺo~ukitakit i, …ĺo~umańßa…¨~…ģ mato~uŇča…ĺ ńßa ¶a ko~u k…ôi- ¶aj no~u ji-nan o~u kaŇča °ajan a pa…ĺa no~u …ĺio~umańßan i ji-nan, maka…¨~…ģo~ufańßaj a ro~upasta ko~uńßi no~u pa °a ¶aan a kitakit. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
